name: frida
summary: Frida is a dynamic instrumentation toolkit with a C/JS core and Python bindings. Hooks Java, native, Obj-C, Swift, and WASM functions at runtime. The default runtime-mod tool for the live_target module's android::swap_frida_script_steal_method.

trust.warning: Attribution/index entry only. Audit provenance, code, releases, and licence before use. Operates against the operator's own authorized scope only.
